title: Little Cuter Piglin
description:
"Hey it's not the eye, it's nose"
yeah i know, but are u happy?
body:
"Piglin's nose isn't an eye."
"Hey, it's a nose."

... Okay, okay. But if the Piglin's nose were an eye, wouldn't that be even cuter?

---

Requires OptiFine or [Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)
